2606.27876.title: SpatialUAV: Benchmarking Spatial Intelligence for Low-Altitude UAV Perception, Collaboration, and Motion
2606.27876.paper_summary: Spatial intelligence is essential for low-altitude unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) perception, collaboration, and navigation. However, existing UAV benchmarks often emphasize image-level recognition, single-view understanding, or narrow answer formats, leaving 3D spatial inference, multi-view collaboration, scene dynamics, and diverse task formulations insufficiently evaluated. To address these gaps, we introduce SpatialUAV, a real low-altitude UAV benchmark comprising 4,331 curated instances across 14 fine-grained task types, covering semantic discrimination, spatial relation, aerial--aerial collaboration, aerial--ground collaboration, and motion understanding. SpatialUAV organizes all samples into a unified visual-input--question--answer schema, while supporting seven input configurations and nine answer formats, including option labels, region identifiers, geometric values, cross-view correspondences, and free-form motion descriptions. To ensure reliable and grounded evaluation, our data construction pipeline integrates detector-assisted regions, depth supervision, metadata-derived rules, extensive manual annotation, blind filtering, and multi-turn human validation, together with task-specific metrics for heterogeneous outputs. Evaluating representative vision-language models across three categories, we show that current models remain far from human-level performance, with pronounced bottlenecks in cross-view association, structured grounding, geometric reasoning, and temporal viewpoint understanding. These results offer empirical guidance for advancing low-altitude UAV spatial intelligence. Code and data are available at https://github.com/Hyu-Zhang/SpatialUAV.
2606.27876.paper_summary_zh: 空間智能對於低空無人機（UAV）的感知、協作和導航至關重要。<lb/>然而，現有的無人機基準通常強調圖像級別的識別、單視角理解或狹窄的答案格式，對於3D空間推理、多視角協作、場景動態和多樣化任務表述的評估則不夠充分。<lb/>為了填補這些空白，我們推出了SpatialUAV，一個真正的低空無人機基準，包含4,331個精心策劃的實例，涵蓋14種細緻的任務類型，包括語義區分、空間關係、空中-空中協作、空中-地面協作和運動理解。<lb/>SpatialUAV將所有樣本組織成統一的視覺輸入-問題-答案架構，同時支持七種輸入配置和九種答案格式，包括選項標籤、區域標識符、幾何值、跨視角對應和自由形式的運動描述。<lb/>為了確保可靠且有根據的評估，我們的數據構建流程整合了檢測器輔助區域、深度監督、元數據衍生規則、大量手動註釋、盲篩選和多輪人類驗證，以及針對異質輸出的任務特定指標。<lb/>在三個類別中評估代表性的視覺-語言模型，我們顯示當前模型距離人類水平的表現仍然相去甚遠，並在跨視角關聯、結構化基礎、幾何推理和時間視點理解方面存在明顯的瓶頸。<lb/>這些結果為推進低空無人機空間智能提供了實證指導。<lb/>代碼和數據可在 https://github.com/Hyu-Zhang/SpatialUAV 獲得。
2606.27876.author: Haoyu Zhang et.al.
2606.27876.authors: Haoyu Zhang, Meng Liu, Qianlong Xiang, Kun Wang, Yaowei Wang, Liqiang Nie
